title: EnergyResourceGenerator
description: Typed schema for generation DER energy resources (solar PV, wind, hydro, biogas, CHP, fuel cell). CIM: GeneratingUnit and subtypes — SOLAR_PV/SOLAR → PhotovoltaicUnit, WIND → WindGeneratingUnit, HYDRO → HydroGeneratingUnit, BIOGAS/CHP → ThermalGeneratingUnit (IEC 61970-301/302). SOLAR is a deprecated alias for SOLAR_PV.

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. SOLAR is deprecated; use SOLAR_PV. CIM: PhotovoltaicUnit, WindGeneratingUnit, HydroGeneratingUnit, ThermalGeneratingUnit (IEC 61970-302).

subResources.description: Child resources (e.g. inverters, tracking units). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. the meter this DER sits behind).

GeoJSONGeometry.description: GeoJSON geometry per RFC 7946 / beckn GeoJSONGeometry/v2.0. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] in WGS-84 (EPSG:4326). For a point: {type: 'Point', coordinates: [lon, lat]}.

Location.description: Physical location per beckn Location/2.0. geo (required) is a GeoJSONGeometry; address (optional) is a postal address. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] per RFC 7946.

EnergyResourceGeneratorAttributes.description: Attributes for generation DER resources. Includes common fields (make, model, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, location) plus generator-specific fields (nominalPowerKw, efficiency).

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP.

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this generator was commissioned.

nominalPowerKw.description: Nominal (nameplate) power output, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.nominalP. Typically equals DC STC rating for solar PV.

efficiency.description: Conversion efficiency as a percentage (0–100). Most relevant for FUEL_CELL and CHP resources.
